rule_sets.matching_content_path_doc: Test-support newtype wrappers: constructors necessarily accept primitives, so Primitive Obsession is a false positive in this crate.

Vendored upstream crate forks (see third_party/README.md). This is upstream code we do not maintain; its per-type SizeOf impls are intentionally uniform in structure, so Code Duplication is not held to this repo's standard here.
